AARDVARK.mutant_changes_text: Aardvarks are anteater-like insectivores adapted to feeding on ants/termites; built for digging; long sticky tongue.

ALLIGATOR & CROCODILE.mutant_changes_text: Large swamp-dwelling carnivorous reptiles with protective scales and long jaws of conical teeth.

abilities.name: Quick Run (1/min)
abilities.details: Double move as a move action; +2 Initiative & Dodge for rest of round.

abilities.name: Hold Breath
abilities.details: Can hold breath for extended periods.

AMPHIBIANS — FROG & TOAD.mutant_changes_text: Many species; aquatic or ground/tree. Insect-eaters with sticky tongues; some secrete toxins.

abilities.name: Master Swimmer
abilities.details: Swimming skill or +20%; survives depths to 400 ft.

abilities.name: Poison Touch
abilities.details: Save vs Poison; fail: 1D6 HP + paralysis 1D6 rounds; success: -1 S/P/D 1D6 rounds; cumulative.

AMPHIBIANS — SALAMANDER, NEWT, & AXOLOTL.mutant_changes_text: Smooth-skinned long-tailed amphibians; famed for regeneration. Terrestrial near water, semi-aquatic, or primarily aquatic.

abilities.name: Regeneration (automatic)
abilities.details: Regrows limbs/organs; +20% save vs coma/death; recover 1 HP + 3 SDC per hour; severe injury effects temporary (6D6 hours).

abilities.name: Master Swimmer
abilities.details: Swimming skill or +20%; survives depths to 400 ft.

APES — CHIMPANZEE.mutant_changes_text: Great apes are closest relatives to humans; already have partial hands/upright stance/human-like looks. Attribute bonus text garbled in source.

APES — GORILLA.mutant_changes_text: Gorilla baseline; weight listed as 200–800 (roll 2D4×100). Attribute bonuses garbled in source.

APES — ORANGUTAN.mutant_changes_text: Orangutan baseline; attribute bonuses garbled in source (mentions social/mental boosts and PS +2 but unclear).

ARMADILLO.mutant_changes_text: Naturally armored mammal (nine-banded armadillo). Length listed as 2 ft + 1 ft tail; weight 20–30 lbs.

BADGER.mutant_changes_text: Squat carnivores that dig into underground nests of prey.

natural_weapons.name: Teeth (1D8)
natural_weapons.details: Bite: 1D8 (cost appears unusually high; kept as written).

BAT.mutant_changes_text: Flying mammals; sonar is useful because they are nocturnal and live in dark caves. Length is wingspan (1–2 ft).

BEAR — BLACK BEAR.mutant_changes_text: Bear baseline (black bear). Weight 300–400 lbs. Build not stated in source; treated as Medium.

abilities.name: Hold Breath
abilities.details: Hold Breath (note: polar bear version costs 5 in source).

BEAR — GRIZZLY.mutant_changes_text: Grizzly bear; uses same Natural Weapons/Abilities as Black Bear entry.

abilities.name: Hold Breath
abilities.details: Hold Breath (note: polar bear version costs 5 in source).

BEAR — BROWN (KODIAK).mutant_changes_text: Brown/Kodiak bear; uses same Natural Weapons/Abilities as Black Bear entry.

abilities.name: Hold Breath
abilities.details: Hold Breath (note: polar bear version costs 5 in source).

BEAR — POLAR.mutant_changes_text: Polar bear; same as bear baseline, except Hold Breath costs 5 Bio-E per note.

abilities.name: Hold Breath
abilities.details: Hold Breath (polar bear special cost note).

BEAVER.mutant_changes_text: Dam-building rodent with wide flat tail; 'natural engineers' and family oriented.

natural_weapons.name: Teeth (1D12) + Gnawing Teeth
natural_weapons.details: Bite: 1D12; can chew wood/clay/crumbly stone 1 in/round; hard plastics/ceramics/concrete/mortar at half speed.

abilities.name: Advanced Excavating
abilities.details: Instinctive permanent structures; double normal time.

BIRDS — CHICKEN.mutant_changes_text: Domesticated; bred for food/eggs; one of the few that can see ultraviolet.

BIRDS — CROW / RAVEN.mutant_changes_text: Intelligent social scavengers; live off crops/foraging. Includes noise/voice mimicry notes.

abilities.name: Noise Mimicry / Effects
abilities.details: Imitate noises; with full speech can imitate voices; +20% Impersonation bonus but still need skill.

BIRDS — PARROT.mutant_changes_text: Colorful birds; many imitate voices. Uses same weapons/abilities pattern as Crow/Raven (including mimicry).

abilities.name: Noise Mimicry / Effects
abilities.details: Imitate noises; with full speech can imitate voices; +20% Impersonation bonus but still need skill.

BIRDS — DUCK.mutant_changes_text: Duck baseline (waterfowl). Hold Breath is automatic.

BIRDS — HAWK / FALCON.mutant_changes_text: Predatory birds with curved beaks/talons/sharp eyesight; dive attacks. Beak line truncated in source.

BIRDS — EAGLE.mutant_changes_text: Eagle; other features match Hawk/Falcon block; abilities text broken in source at this point.

BIRDS — PENGUIN.mutant_changes_text: Flightless diving birds adapted to cold climates; smaller temperate species exist.

abilities.name: Master Swimmer
abilities.details: Swimming skill or +20%; survive depths to 500 ft.

BIRDS — PIGEON.mutant_changes_text: Pigeon baseline for city birds/doves/game birds. Beak damage unclear in source line.

natural_weapons.name: Beak (damage unclear)
natural_weapons.details: Beak damage not clearly stated in source line.

natural_weapons.name: Beak (damage unclear)
natural_weapons.details: Beak damage not clearly stated in source line.

BIRDS — WILD GAME BIRDS (GROUSE / PARTRI.mutant_changes_text: Wild game bird variant (same package as Pigeon).

natural_weapons.name: Beak (damage unclear)
natural_weapons.details: Beak damage not clearly stated in source line.

BIRDS — SMALL WILD BIRDS.mutant_changes_text: Small birds that feed on grains/seeds/fruits/insects; includes many urban/suburban forest species.

BIRDS — TURKEY.mutant_changes_text: Domestic turkey is flightless and bred for food; wild turkeys are leaner/faster and can fly.

BUFFALO & BISON.mutant_changes_text: Bison are huge North American grazers with a shoulder hump; true buffalo are Africa/Asia and lack the hump.

CAMEL.mutant_changes_text: Desert pack animals known for water storage; often short-tempered.

abilities.name: Spit
abilities.details: 12 ft; +2 Strike; called shot to eyes blinds 1D4 rounds.

abilities.name: Water Storage
abilities.details: 2 days per gallon; store up to 10 gallons; drink/store in 12 minutes.

CANINES — DOGS.mutant_changes_text: Many breeds; baseline is average mongrel. Bio-E: 65 (reduce by 5 for each step above Size Level 3). Attribute bonuses vary by size: SL 3–5: IQ+2 MA+2 PP+2 Spd+2; SL 6–8: IQ+2 MA+2 PS+2 Spd+2.

CANINES — FOX.mutant_changes_text: Fox baseline (red/gray/arctic similar). Build spelled 'Lone' in source.

CANINES — COYOTE.mutant_changes_text: Coyote baseline; other features are same as wolf block per source note.

DEER.mutant_changes_text: Deer baseline (hands/biped/speech/looks shared within deer/elk/moose block per source).

ELEPHANT.mutant_changes_text: Largest land animal; strong; trunk functions as flexible prehensile limb.

abilities.name: Prehensile Trunk
abilities.details: Extra limb; counts as Partial Hand; long enough to touch ground.

FELINES — BOBCAT.mutant_changes_text: Bobcat (feline block; other features match Lynx per note).

FELINES — CHEETAH.mutant_changes_text: Fastest mammals; sleek athletic build. Height listed (up to 30 inches tall).

abilities.name: Quick Run (1/min)
abilities.details: Double move; +2 Initiative & Dodge for rest of round.

FELINES — LION.mutant_changes_text: Lion baseline. Weight unclear in source line; left as null.

GOAT.mutant_changes_text: Domesticated milk/meat animal; hardy. Length line appears inconsistent (kept as written: 'up to 10 inches long').

HIPPOPOTAMUS.mutant_changes_text: Giant aggressive grazers; spend most of life in water.

HORSE (RIDING HORSE).mutant_changes_text: Domesticated grazing animal; typical riding horse. Height listed as up to 60 inches at shoulder.

LEMUR.mutant_changes_text: Long-snouted primate from Madagascar (ring-tailed lemur baseline).

LIZARDS (GROUP ENTRY).mutant_changes_text: Group entry: Gecko/Skink (SL1), Chameleon/Horned Lizard (SL2), Gila Monster/Iguana (SL3), Komodo Dragon (SL13). Bio-E: 85/80/75/25 respectively; attribute bonuses vary by variant. This entry is kept as a group placeholder.

MARTEN & MINK.mutant_changes_text: Larger cousins to weasels; long bodies; valuable fur. Martens are fox-faced climbers; minks live near water.

abilities.name: Tight Squeeze (automatic)
abilities.details: Fit through openings a quarter their Size Level.

MOLE.mutant_changes_text: Small furry burrowers adapted to underground life. Looks partial/full lines cut off in source.

MONKEY (ARBOREAL).mutant_changes_text: Arboreal monkeys (prehensile tails) kept as pets/research animals; markings vary.

BABOON.mutant_changes_text: Ground-dwelling tribal monkeys; mandrills/geladas similar. Uses same ability package as Monkey (Arboreal) per source.

MUSKRAT.mutant_changes_text: River-dwelling vegetarians/scavengers; build dens with underwater entrances. Abilities not listed in source beyond gnawing note.

natural_weapons.name: Teeth (damage unclear)
natural_weapons.details: Bite damage unclear in source line.

natural_weapons.name: Teeth (1D10) + Gnawing Teeth
natural_weapons.details: Bite: 1D10; gnawing per beaver-style chew rules.

RABBIT.mutant_changes_text: Rabbits/hares worldwide; small vegetarians that depend on speed and agility.

RACCOON.mutant_changes_text: Adaptable nocturnal scavengers. Looks text partially truncated in source.

RHINOCEROS.mutant_changes_text: Aggressive grazing animals; good runners; very strong. African rhinos have two horns; Great Indian rhino has one.

PIG.mutant_changes_text: Domesticated pigs bred for meat production; can be very large.

BOAR.mutant_changes_text: Aggressive wild pigs; invasive; dangerous with tusks.

abilities.name: Quill Defense
abilities.details: Natural Armor AR 12, +20 SDC; attackers rolling <12 take 1D12; mutant gets +1D12 on unarmed melee.

RODENTS (GROUP ENTRY).mutant_changes_text: Group entry: SL1 (Mice/Gerbils/Hamsters) Bio-E 85; SL2 (Rats/Guinea Pigs/Pikas) Bio-E 80. Attribute bonuses vary by subgroup. This entry is kept as a group placeholder.

SHARK (Tiger Shark baseline).mutant_changes_text: Ancient aquatic apex predators; entry lists tiger shark baseline.

abilities.name: Master Swimmer
abilities.details: Swimming skill or +20%; depth line cut off in source.

SHEEP.mutant_changes_text: This domesticaded animal has beem nred for meat and wool

SKUNK (Striped).mutant_changes_text: Striped skunk; uses stink glands as defense. Looks text mixed/truncated in source.

abilities.name: Stink Spray
abilities.details: Butyl mercaptan musk w/ sulfuric acid; 8/day; 10 ft; failed Save vs Toxin = nausea/incapacitated 2D6 minutes; stench lasts 2D12 days; Advanced Smell = -4 to save.

SKUNK (Spotted).mutant_changes_text: Spotted skunk variant (same stink spray). Weight listed as 23 lbs in source (unusual; kept).

abilities.name: Stink Spray
abilities.details: Butyl mercaptan musk w/ sulfuric acid; 8/day; 10 ft; failed Save vs Toxin = nausea/incapacitated 2D6 minutes; stench lasts 2D12 days; Advanced Smell = -4 to save.

SQUIRREL.mutant_changes_text: Common urban wild mammal; great climbers. Flying squirrels can glide.

TURTLES — POND TURTLE.mutant_changes_text: Many environments; TMNT mutated from small pond turtles.

abilities.name: Master Swimmer
abilities.details: Swimming skill or +20%; survives to 500 ft.

TURTLES — SNAPPING TURTLE.mutant_changes_text: Snapping turtle; uses same turtle armor block as pond turtle.

abilities.name: Master Swimmer
abilities.details: Swimming skill or +20%; survives to 500 ft.

WEASEL.mutant_changes_text: Fearless carnivore; narrow body fits small holes.

natural_weapons.name: Teeth (damage unclear)
natural_weapons.details: Bite damage not clearly stated in source line.

abilities.name: Tight Squeeze (automatic)
abilities.details: Can fit through very small openings.

abilities.name: Hyper Metabolism
abilities.details: +2 Initiative, +2 Dodge, +1 action/round, +10% Escape Artist; requires frequent naps/constant eating; must eat own weight daily; half meat.

FERRET.mutant_changes_text: Similar to weasels but friendlier; popular pets. Uses same ability package as Weasel per source note.

natural_weapons.name: Teeth (damage unclear)
natural_weapons.details: Bite damage unclear in source line.

abilities.name: Tight Squeeze (automatic)
abilities.details: Can fit through very small openings.

abilities.name: Hyper Metabolism
abilities.details: +2 Initiative, +2 Dodge, +1 action/round, +10% Escape Artist; requires frequent naps/constant eating; must eat own weight daily; half meat.

WOLVERINE.mutant_changes_text: Northern carnivore with extreme endurance; can drive off bears; adaptable predator. Human-feature cost lines garbled in source.

abilities.name: Tough Hide (automatic)
abilities.details: +20 SDC; +4 save vs cold; cold does half damage.

ALLOSAUROID.mutant_changes_text: Large predatory dinosaur with massive jaws, long arms, and powerful claws.

ANKYLOSAUROID.mutant_changes_text: Heavily armored herbivore with bone plating, horns, and a powerful tail club.

BRONTOSAUROID.mutant_changes_text: Massive long-neck herbivore adapted for reaching high vegetation.

DROMAEOSAUROID.mutant_changes_text: Fast, pack-hunting predator with deadly claw attacks and high agility.

DUCKOID.mutant_changes_text: Duck-billed dinosaur with herd instincts and strong survival traits.

HYPSILOPHOID.mutant_changes_text: Small, fast herbivore adapted for speed and agility.

PACHYCEPHALOID.mutant_changes_text: Thick-skulled dinosaur built for headbutting and impact combat.

PTERASOID.mutant_changes_text: Flying reptile adapted for gliding and aerial hunting.

STEGOSAUROID.mutant_changes_text: Armored herbivore with back plates and spiked tail.

SAURINOID.mutant_changes_text: Highly intelligent, agile dinosaur with humanoid traits.

RAPTOROID.mutant_changes_text: Pack-hunting dinosaur similar to velociraptors; agile, intelligent, and fast.

TRICERATOID.mutant_changes_text: Massive horned herbivore with heavy skull armor and defensive combat traits.

TYRANNOSAUR.mutant_changes_text: Apex predator with massive jaws and powerful bite force.

ARGENTAVIDON.mutant_changes_text: Giant prehistoric vulture-like bird adapted for flight and scavenging.

DIATRYMON.mutant_changes_text: Large flightless predator bird known for speed and strong attacks.

GLYPTODON.mutant_changes_text: Armored mammal resembling a giant turtle with a clubbed tail.

HYENODON.mutant_changes_text: Large prehistoric predator similar to hyenas, known for pack hunting.

MASTODON / WOOLLY MAMMOTH.mutant_changes_text: Large elephant-like mammal adapted for cold climates.

MEGATHERION.mutant_changes_text: Massive prehistoric sloth with powerful climbing claws.

PARACERATHERION.mutant_changes_text: Enormous hornless rhino-like mammal, one of the largest land mammals ever.

SMILODON.mutant_changes_text: Saber-toothed predator known for powerful jaws and ambush tactics.

THYLODON.mutant_changes_text: Marsupial ambush predator with powerful jaws and climbing ability.
